articles.title: 700 open burning cases recorded in Perak since January 2026
articles.summary: IPOH: A total of 700 open burning cases involving vegetation have been recorded in Perak from January to March 2026. Read full story

articles.title: Cheras landlord allegedly attacked by tenant in tiff over parking
articles.summary: KUALA LUMPUR: A homeowner in Taman Midah, Cheras, here has been allegedly attacked by his tenant following a dispute over parking. Read full story

articles.title: Rain in parts of Kedah brings relief after prolonged hot spell
articles.summary: ALOR SETAR: Rain in several areas in Kedah, including Kota Setar, Kubang Pasu and Kuala Muda, has brought welcome relief after months of hot and dry weather. Read full story

articles.title: Fight breaks out between two rival Kota Kinabalu tour operators
articles.summary: KOTA KINABALU: Employees from two rival tour companies allegedly got into a fight in Jesselton Point here. Read full story

articles.title: Rompin air quality at unhealthy levels due to plantation fire
articles.summary: KUANTAN: Air quality in Rompin remained at an unhealthy level on Sunday (March 29), with the Air Pollutant Index (API) recorded at 152 due to a fire at an oil palm plantation. Read full story

articles.title: Man driving while intoxicated kills motorcyclist in Klang crash
articles.summary: KLANG: A motorcyclist has been killed after a car driven by a man allegedly high on drugs and alcohol rammed into at high speed here. Read full story

articles.title: Kerian padi farmers concerned as planting season delayed due to deferred irrigation
articles.summary: IPOH: Padi farmers in Kerian are expressing concern about the current hot weather, which is causing critical levels at the Bukit Merah Dam. Read full story
